creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
This is a request for the recently removed archivers/bzip port.
I have the original source, and until, or unless archivers/bzip2
offers the same options, I'd like to keep this port available.
It also requires typing one less character to invoke it, than
bzip2 does. ;)

I'd also like to see if it might [ever] be possible to merge
this with bzip2.

Patch to follow (as a reply) within a few minutes.

--Chris

Fix: 

Use the patch I will post as a reply to this pr(1).
How-To-Repeat: Any attempt to build, will fail.
